projectDescription: A framework-agnostic PHP 8.3+ SDK for integrating AI capabilities — text, image, speech, transcription, embeddings, video, and real-time sessions — through a unified fluent API with first-class support for OpenAI, Anthropic, and any OpenAI-compatible provider.
keyFeatures: Unified fluent API for text, image, speech, transcription, embeddings, and video generation
Streaming support with token-by-token callbacks and structured stream events
Agentic tool calling with automatic multi-step execution loops
Structured output with JSON Schema validation via Output and Schema builders
Real-time voice, transcription, and translation sessions over WebSocket and HTTP/2
First-class OpenAI and Anthropic providers plus any OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Extended reasoning (chain-of-thought) support across supported models
PSR-18 / PSR-7 compatible, framework-agnostic, works in Laravel, Symfony, or plain PHP
Testing fakes for all modalities — no HTTP mocking required
Multimodal inputs: text, images, audio, video, and files
publicApiSurface: PendingTextRequest: prompt(), instructions(), messages(), temperature(), maxTokens(), topP(), maxSteps(), tools(), toolChoice(), reasoning(), stream(), run()
PendingImageRequest: prompt(), count(), size(), aspectRatio(), seed(), run()
PendingVideoRequest: prompt(), image(), video(), output(), run(), job()
Stream: parts(), chunks(), run(), result(), onChunk(), onToolCall(), onFinish(), onError()
TextResult, ImageResult, AudioResult, TranscriptResult, EmbeddingResult, VideoResult
FakeTextModel, FakeImageModel, FakeSpeechModel, FakeTranscriptionModel, FakeEmbeddingModel, FakeVideoModel
